user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Dyson
Product type: Airwrap hair styling tool
Tone: innovative, premium, empowering
Visual style: Clean, modern visuals with sleek product shots emphasizing technology and effortless elegance.
Conceptual technique: demonstrative product storytelling
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Clean, modern visuals with sleek product shots emphasizing technology and effortless elegance
brief.headline: Style Without Limits
brief.subheadline: The Dyson Airwrap: Harness Air. Not Heat.
brief.body_copy: Experience the future of hair styling with Dyson Airwrap. Using intelligent heat control and powerful airflow, it styles your hair effortlessly, protecting its natural shine and strength. From voluminous curls to sleek finishes, empower your creativity with every stroke.

visual_direction.composition: A sleek, close-up shot of the Dyson Airwrap in action, gently wrapping a strand of hair using airflow, set against a minimalist white or light gray background.
visual_direction.lighting: Soft, diffused lighting to highlight the metallic and technological details of the product, enhancing its premium feel.
visual_direction.color_palette: Monochrome with accents of Dyson's signature purple and metallic silver to emphasize innovation and luxury.
visual_direction.additional_elements: Subtle, translucent airflow lines illustrating the movement of air around the hair to visually demonstrate the technology in use.
visual_direction.model: Optional: A confident, modern woman with naturally styled hair, showcasing effortless elegance and empowerment.
